packages.name: SIA identity package
packages.description: 3D or 2D avatar, small chat avatar, voice avatar states, waveform/particle style, error/permission states.

packages.name: Onboarding motion package
packages.description: Splash reveal, four carousel motion scenes, SIA onboarding canvas, reduced-motion stills.

packages.name: Domain content package
packages.description: Exercise, yoga, recipe, meal, finance, learning, creativity, spirituality, relationship visual systems.

packages.name: Media and content package
packages.description: Photo thumbnails, video posters, playlist/album art, receipt/photo placeholders, protected media states.

packages.name: Gamification package
packages.description: Achievement badges, XP celebration, streak flame, freeze token, mission-type badges.

packages.name: Empty and system package
packages.description: No notifications, no journal entries, no schedule, help, permissions, force update, search no-results, app rating.

packages.name: Provider and logo package
packages.description: Google, Apple, WhatsApp, Spotify, YouTube, WHOOP, calendar/health sources — official usage only.
